prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约19820→19766→18957→17945→20313，近4年整体呈前移趋势（位次数字减小），但2025年大幅后移至20313名，反弹约2368名，波动 较大；2025年基准约20313名；本省物理类计划2021年38人、2022年37人、2023年43人、2024年32人、2025年44人；2026年计划大幅扩招至62人，较2025 年增加18人（+41%），显著缓解竞争压力，位次预计明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2021年第68名→2026年第61名，排名持续上升，综合实力稳步增强，对考 生吸引力有所提升；2026年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及外卖配送管理争议），但整体关注度一般；抖音热度总排名第38位（较热），短视频曝光量中等，报考关 注度平稳；心理学A、教育学A、马克思主义理论A-，师范与农学特色鲜明，与招生专业中的教育学、应用心理学等直接关联，对相关方向考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工科类专业（电气、机械、计算机类）社会热度较高；本省2026年物理类考生估算约20.4万人，较2025年增加约6.2%，竞争基数扩大；西南大学位于重庆（西南地区），福建考生跨省报考意愿中等。 综合2025年位次大幅后移的波动特征、2026年计划大幅扩招41%的显著利好、本省物理类考生增加约6.2%的竞争加剧，以及学校排名持续上升的吸引力增强，扩 招效应远大于考生增加效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约25099名，区间24599–25599名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19820 → 19766 → 18957 → 17945 → 20313. Over the past 4 years, there was an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), but in 2025, it significantly shifted backward to 20313, a rebound of about 2368 places, indicating considerable fluctuation. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 20313. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 38 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 44 in 2025. In 2026, the plan expands significantly to 62, an increase of 18 (+41%) compared to 2025, which notably alleviates competition pressure and is expected to cause a significant backward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it went from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with a continuously rising ranking and steadily strengthening comprehensive strength, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly related to disputes over food delivery management), but overall attention is average. Douyin heat ranking is 38th (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderate, and application attention is stable. Psychology is rated A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, with distinctive features in teacher training and agriculture, directly related to enrollment majors such as Education and Applied Psychology, attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors (Electrical, Mechanical, Computer Science) have high social popularity. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 204,000, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025, expanding the competition base. Southwest University is located in Chongqing (Southwest region), and the willingness of Fujian candidates to apply across provinces is moderate. Considering the significant backward shift fluctuation in 2025 rankings, the notable benefit of a 41% expansion in 2026 plans, the intensified competition from a 6.2% increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, and the enhanced appeal from continuously rising rankings, the expansion effect far outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 25099, with a range of 24599–25599.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Artificial Intelligence / Intelligent Science and Technology
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Intelligent Vehicle Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting)
- Materials (including Materials Physics, Metallic Materials Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Food Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Animal Science (Rongchang Campus)
- Aquaculture (Rongchang Campus) (including Aquaculture, Aquarium Science and Technology)
- Veterinary Medicine (Rongchang Campus) (five-year program)
- Marketing (Rongchang Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 24599–25599, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 24000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Electrical and AI. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 25500), it is recommended to use Tier 3 Rongchang Campus majors as safety.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的波动特征、2026年计划小幅扩招9%的有限利好、本省历史类考生增加约6. 2%的竞争加剧，以及学校排名上升的微弱吸引力，扩招与考生增加效应基本抵消，但2025年位次已处于近年高位，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准附近小幅波动；预测最低位次 约3763名，区间3263–4263名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3101 → 2901 → 2913 → 2850 → 3597. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable within the 2850–3101 range, but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 3597, a rebound of about 747 places, showing clear fluctuation. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3597. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 16 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 11 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 12, a slight increase of 1 (+9%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion and little effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class University. On the Soft Science main ranking, it rose from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with continuously improving rankings and steadily enhancing comprehensive strength. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to food delivery management controversy), but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 38th overall (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. Psychology is rated A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, which are related to majors in the History Category enrollment such as Education (Yan Yangchu Innovation Experimental Class) and Law, attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training and law majors is stable. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in the province is about 64,000, an increase of approximately 6.2% compared to 2025, expanding the competition base. Southwest University is located in Chongqing, and the willingness of Fujian candidates to apply across provinces is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking drop in 2025, the limited benefit of a 9% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 6.2% increase in provincial History Category candidates, and the weak attraction of the university's rising ranking, the effects of expansion and candidate increase largely offset each other. However, the 2025 ranking is already at a recent high, so the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to fluctuate slightly around the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3763, with a range of 3263–4263.
